file_insights.changes_summary: Added Linux systemd support alongside existing macOS launchd implementation
key_additions: systemd path helpers: systemd_user_dir(), systemd_service_path(), systemd_path_path()
generate_systemd_service() - creates systemd .service units with Type=oneshot
generate_systemd_path() - creates systemd .path units for file watching with dynamic team directory discovery
Refactored cmd_factory_install(), cmd_factory_start(), cmd_factory_stop(), cmd_factory_status() for multi-platform support

patterns_discovered.name: Platform Abstraction Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Compile-time OS detection via cfg!(target_os) with helper functions used to branch execution flow

patterns_discovered.name: Configuration Template Generation
patterns_discovered.description: Both systemd and launchd configs generated from shared parameters (label, subcommand, repo_root) using string formatting

patterns_discovered.name: Dynamic Directory Discovery
patterns_discovered.description: generate_systemd_path() scans .cards/ for team-* directories and includes all in PathChanged directives
patterns_discovered.rationale: Allows watching multiple team subdirectories without hardcoding paths

patterns_discovered.name: Lenient Command Execution
patterns_discovered.description: All systemctl commands execute with error logging (eprintln!) but non-fatal—installation continues even if enable/start fails
patterns_discovered.contrast: Could allow misconfigured services to remain silent

gotchas_discovered.issue: systemd --user flag required for user-level services
gotchas_discovered.impact: Services run as user, not system; affects HOME path availability and permissions model
systemd_user_dir() will panic if HOME not set; no fallback provided

gotchas_discovered.issue: fs::read_dir() errors silently swallowed in generate_systemd_path()
gotchas_discovered.impact: If .cards/ unreadable or missing, no team directories discovered; path unit may be incomplete

gotchas_discovered.issue: Type=oneshot service may prevent future re-triggering
gotchas_discovered.impact: If service completes, path unit must restart path watching daemon (implicit via systemd)
Non-UTF8 error messages truncated/corrupted in error output

approach_details.strategy: Platform-conditional branching with separate implementation functions per OS
strengths: Clear separation of macOS (launchd) and Linux (systemd) code paths
Reuses path resolution logic via resolve_repo_root() helper
Extracted install_zellij_plugin() to DRY shared logic
Systemd .path units enable file-watching equivalent to launchd WatchPaths
approach_details.completeness: Both install, start, stop, and status commands support both platforms
approach_details.testing_gap: No error case testing for missing systemd or launchctl tools

recommendations.item: Add context to systemctl command failures with which unit and which operation failed
recommendations.suggested: Use anyhow::Context or custom error type to provide full call stack

recommendations.item: Add HOME fallback or validation in systemd_user_dir()
recommendations.rationale: Panic-on-HOME-unset is unexplained and may occur in headless/test environments

recommendations.item: Log systemd unit contents after write (matching launchd plist output style)
Add integration test for generate_systemd_service() and generate_systemd_path() output validity
recommendations.suggested: Parse output and validate [Unit], [Service], [Path] sections are present

recommendations.item: Document systemd .path vs .service relationship and lifecycle
recommendations.rationale: Path unit triggers service on file change; users must understand this to debug
